# Spinner

Indicates an indeterminate loading state with an accessible label.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/spinner
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="spinner" example={0} code={`<Spinner aria-label="Loading" />`} />

```tsx
<Spinner aria-label="Loading" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="spinner"
  example={1}
  code={`<Spinner size="lg" aria-label="Loading project" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Spinner size="lg" aria-label="Loading project" />
```

<ComponentPreview slug="spinner" example={2} code={`<Spinner size="sm" aria-label="Saving" />`} />

```tsx
<Spinner size="sm" aria-label="Saving" />
```

## Props

| Prop           | Type          | Required | Default | Description                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `size`         | `SpinnerSize` | No       | -       | -                                                                       |
| `'aria-label'` | `string`      | No       | -       | Accessible name announced to assistive tech. Defaults to \`"Loading"\`. |

## Variants

| Variant | Values                 |
| ------- | ---------------------- |
| `size`  | `sm`, `md`, `lg`, `xl` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/spinner.json`
- Recipe: `spinner`
- Files: `src/components/ui/spinner.tsx`
